title: Beta Times
description: A hybrid between beta and 1.20.1. Feel the golden ages of the game again!
body:
![Title image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/42GVMkuD/images/13e7c8e8d99681fba4f8f297722e7ff14f2bd4ef.png)
This modpack gives you the best of both worlds—the nostalgic charm of the old with the functionality of the new! Step back in time to relive the Beta experience, with modern performance tweaks to keep gameplay smooth.

# Features
## Beta Textures
This pack includes the [Golden Days](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/golden-days) resourcepack, which restores Minecraft’s classic beta look. Newer textures are seamlessly adjusted to maintain the nostalgic feel.

## Old Mechanics
The [Nostalgic Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/nostalgic-tweaks) mod brings back beloved mechanics, such as:
  - Classic combat with spam-clicking and sword blocking
  - The ladder-climbing glitch (climb through a single space between ladders)
  - Optional pre-beta food system, without hunger, sprinting, or stackable food

## Hybrid World Generation
Thanks to the [Cascades](https://modrinth.com/mod/hybrid-beta) mod, you can explore worlds that mix old-school terrain with new biomes—bringing the best of both eras.

## Performance Optimization
The pack is optimized for smooth performance on any system. Mods like [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) and [Nvidium](https://modrinth.com/mod/nvidium) ensure stable FPS, even on low-end PCs.


## Classic Food System
Want the old pre-beta 1.8 food system? Simply press the END key, navigate to "Config Menu" > "Manage" > "Config Presets", and hold the "Apply" button under the "Beta Times No Hunger.json" preset.
#

Found a bug or have a suggestion? Report it on my [Github Issue Tracker](https://github.com/TheHansel/beta-times/issues)!
